titel: Questions and answers about the new customs fee of 3 euros:
html:
European Commission: Questions and Answers, Brussels, July 1, 2026.

How is the temporary customs duty of 3 euros applied in practice?

The 3-euro charge applies per unit for shipments with a value of up to 150 euros. This measure applies to goods...
tldr: Starting in July 2026, a fee of 3 euros will be introduced for certain packages being shipped across borders. The purpose is to streamline border controls and reduce the need for cash transactions.
lattlast:
The European Commission, the executive body of the EU, has decided on a new customs duty of €3 per item. This charge applies to packages with a value of no more than €150.

The purpose of this new rule is to simplify border control procedures and make it easier to handle cashless payments. The rule will come into effect on July 1, 2026.

The fee is charged per unit, meaning that each individual item in a package may be subject to its own charge if it is valued at less than €150.
